text: Wake before dawn. Restless, detached, unable to stay with one task.
Flat afternoon. Hard to focus. Everything feels distant and slowed.
Clear morning. Work moved normally. No sense of drift.
Detached feeling returned at night. Fragmented thoughts, little momentum.
More settled. Meals, calls, and errands happened without friction.
Back to a restless loop. Reading the same lines repeatedly.
Steady morning. Attention held. The distant feeling did not appear.
Detached again after sunset. Hard to begin anything. Pace feels slowed.
Notably restless. Started several tasks, finished none.
Order returned for a few days. Calls answered. Notes made sense.
Distant again. Slow pace, low momentum, hard to remain with one task.
Restless evening. Fragmented attention. Several unfinished starts.
A steadier week. No real drift. Tasks completed in sequence.
Detached state appeared again after midnight. Everything felt slowed and far away.
Restless and distant. Read the same paragraph several times.
Clear enough to work. No sign of the slowed detached state.
The same detached pattern returned. Hard to begin. Hard to hold attention.
Restless again near midnight. Pace slowed. Focus broke into fragments.
